## Architecture Notes

<!--
Which layers would change? Check all that apply and note the impact.
- [ ] ApplicationCore (entities, services, interfaces) — requires most care; no Infrastructure refs allowed
- [ ] Infrastructure (EF Core, Identity) — may need EF migration
- [ ] Web (Razor Pages, MVC) — UI/UX changes
- [ ] PublicApi (FastEndpoints) — API contract change; check BlazorAdmin
- [ ] BlazorAdmin — WASM; must match PublicApi contract
- [ ] CI/CD / build
-->
